steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice B (1)
steps.content:
Testing choice B: $$f(x)=1$$
Then $$f(0)=1$$ and $$f(1)=1$$, but the problem states $$f(0)=17$$ and $$f(1)=17$$.
Since the values do not match, choice B fails.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice C (17)
steps.content:
Testing choice C: $$f(x)=17$$
Then $$f(0)=17$$ and $$f(1)=17$$, which exactly match the given conditions.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
